body.role: Oullin is a boutique software engineering and architecture consultancy focused on resilient systems, modernisation, and digital transformation in the AI era.
body.origin: The name still points to movement and transformation, but the work is grounded in senior engineering judgement and systems that have to keep running.
body.mission: Led by Gustavo Ocanto, with 20+ years across software, consulting, software architecture, AI-first products and companies, and technical management, including 10+ years in banking.

work.title: Regulated & High-Trust Systems
work.description: Software for banking and other environments where reliability, risk, and operational discipline are not optional.

work.title: Modernization In The AI Era
work.description: Practical digital transformation that connects legacy reality, platform evolution, and AI capability without hype.

work.title: Architecture & Technical Leadership
work.description: Hands-on guidance across software architecture, delivery, and technical management when the systems are complex and the stakes are real.
